targets.rawSql:
select   $__timeGroup(CollectDate, '1d') as time, ServerName + ' ' + Drive as SrvDrive , max(round((TotalSpaceMB-FreeSpaceMB)/TotalSpaceMB*100,2)) as usePct
from TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage a , [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] b
where a.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
and b.InstanceID in (2)
and  $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
group by $__timeGroup(CollectDate, '1d'), Drive, ServerName
-- order by ServerName, CollectDate, Drive
order by time

select   $__timeGroup(CollectDate, '1d') as time, ServerName + ' ' + Drive as SrvDrive , max(round((TotalSpaceMB-FreeSpaceMB)/TotalSpaceMB*100,2)) as usePct
from TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage a , [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] b
where a.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
and b.InstanceID in (51)
and  $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
group by $__timeGroup(CollectDate, '1d'), Drive, ServerName
-- order by ServerName, CollectDate, Drive

SELECT 
	$__timeGroup(a.CollectDate, '1d') AS time
	, ServerName + ' ' + a.Drive AS SrvDrive 
	, MAX(ROUND((ISNULL(a.TotalSpaceMB,c.TotalSpaceMB) - a.FreeSpaceMB) / ISNULL(a.TotalSpaceMB,c.TotalSpaceMB) * 100,2)) AS usePct
FROM TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage a 
INNER JOIN dbo.META2_M_InstanceInfo b ON a.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 'F:\' AS Drive, 409597 AS TotalSpaceMB
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'G:\' AS Drive, 153597 AS TotalSpaceMB
) c ON c.Drive = a.Drive AND b.InstanceID = 21				
WHERE b.InstanceID IN (21)
AND $__timeFilter(CollectDate)
GROUP BY $__timeGroup(CollectDate, '1d'), a.Drive, ServerName
-- order by ServerName, CollectDate, Drive
order by time

select   $__timeGroup(CollectDate, '1d') as time, ServerName + ' ' + Drive as SrvDrive , max(round((TotalSpaceMB-FreeSpaceMB)/TotalSpaceMB*100,2)) as usePct
from TBL2_M_DatabaseDiskUsage a , [dbo].[META2_M_InstanceInfo] b
where a.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
